step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Select "SIGNAL CHECK", and proceed with checking using the intelligent tester.

atten3.ptxt: Select "SIGNAL CHECK" from the "DTC CHECK" screen displayed on the intelligent tester to clear the output DTCs (both present and past).

item.ptxt: DTCs can be detected more sensitively in check mode than in normal diagnosis mode.
Perform check mode inspection when a malfunction in each squib circuit is suspected even after the normal system code is output through normal diagnosis mode inspection.
